summary: Supplementary Training UI Integration and Bulk Document Requests testing completed. All 22 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Training Summary card conditionally renders on dashboard (hidden when counts=0), Training Evaluation in employee profile readiness panel conditionally renders (hidden when blockerCount=0 and warningCount=0), Bulk Requests functionality fully working with dialog, selection, and API integration.

minor.issue: Missing 'document_name' context key in email template causes warning logs but emails still send successfully

critical_code_review_comments: EmployeesPage.js has React Hook useEffect missing dependencies warnings (lines 82, 142) - minor linting issue, not blocking functionality
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test IDs: Employee d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77 (Olakunle Alonge), Employee ccfcbdbb-feda-4043-a8b2-2f1f9da88bdf (Lawrence Egbeni)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Training UI Integration and Bulk Document Requests fully implemented and tested. Key features verified: (1) GET /api/dashboard/training-summary returns correct structure with training_overdue_count, training_due_soon_count, employees_blocked_by_training, (2) GET /api/employees/{id}/training returns training evaluation with overall, blockerCount, warningCount, items array, (3) Training Summary card on Dashboard conditionally renders only when training counts > 0, (4) Training Evaluation section in Employee Profile readiness panel conditionally renders only when blockerCount > 0 or warningCount > 0, (5) Bulk Requests button on Employees page enters bulk mode with Select All, Request Documents, Exit buttons, (6) Checkbox selection in bulk mode works for multiple employees, (7) Bulk Document Request dialog opens with request type selector (missing vs specific), due days dropdown, custom message textarea, (8) POST /api/bulk/document-requests creates batch requests with deduplication, (9) GET /api/bulk/pending-requests returns pending document requests, (10) POST /api/bulk/cancel-requests cancels multiple pending requests. Test employee Olakunle Alonge has 6/6 training items verified/completed so Training Status section is hidden in readiness panel (expected conditional render behavior).

training_summary_dashboard_endpoint.details: GET /api/dashboard/training-summary returns training_overdue_count, training_due_soon_count, employees_blocked_by_training, overdue_employees, due_soon_employees, blocked_employees

employee_training_evaluation_endpoint.details: GET /api/employees/{id}/training returns overall status, blockerCount, warningCount, items array with title, status, blocker flag

training_summary_card_dashboard_ui.details: Training Status card conditionally renders on dashboard - hidden when all training counts are 0 (correct behavior)

training_evaluation_readiness_panel_ui.details: Training Status section in employee profile readiness panel conditionally renders - hidden when blockerCount=0 and warningCount=0 (correct behavior)

bulk_requests_button.details: Bulk Requests button on Employees page enters bulk mode with Select All, Request Documents, Exit buttons

bulk_checkbox_selection.details: Checkbox selection in bulk mode works for multiple employees, shows '2 selected' count

bulk_document_request_dialog.details: Dialog opens with request type selector (All missing documents auto-detect / Specific document types), Due in days dropdown (7/14/21/30), Custom message textarea, Cancel and Send Requests buttons

bulk_document_requests_api.details: POST /api/bulk/document-requests creates batch requests, returns total_employees, total_requests_created, total_emails_sent, total_skipped, details, errors

bulk_pending_requests_api.details: GET /api/bulk/pending-requests returns total count and requests list with employee names and requirement names

bulk_cancel_requests_api.details: POST /api/bulk/cancel-requests cancels multiple pending requests, returns cancelled count and errors
